title: A New Horizon
lines: Against all odds, you have navigated the horrors of the village, the depths of the sewers, and the surreal reaches of the desert.
Your survival rating is perfect, and your knowledge of the bio-hazard threat is absolute.
On the far side of the mountains, a rescue helicopter finally descends from the clouds. You are the last survivor of the Stz incident, and your story will change the world.
The sun rises on a new beginning. You have conquered the madness.

options.desc: Wake up in your tent—another cycle begins
